channel.title: Advisor Growth Lab Resources
channel.description: Articles and podcast transcripts for experienced financial advisors evaluating transitions, business-model fit, economics, and practice growth.

item.title: The real math behind a 7-year forgivable note
item.description: A practical explanation of forgivable-note economics, remaining balances, and the clauses advisors should understand before signing.

item.title: The clawback math nobody walks you through before the 7-year note
item.description: Model the remaining balance, repayment triggers, and full-term economics before signing a financial advisor forgivable note.

item.title: What to do when your firm gets bought
item.description: How advisors can evaluate a retention offer, business-model changes, and the choice to stay or move after an acquisition.

item.title: How to read a retention offer after your firm is acquired
item.description: Evaluate the amount, term, restrictions, grid, and opportunity cost before signing a retention offer.

item.title: Are you ready to leave, or just having a bad quarter?
item.description: A private framework for separating temporary frustration from real transition readiness.

item.title: How to know if you are actually ready to leave your firm
item.description: Read your book, economics, timing, and life before anyone knows you are asking.
